sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, amount) VALUES (1, DECIMAL(10, 2) '12345.67');
UPDATE test_decimal SET amount = amount + DECIMAL(10, 2) '10.00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, amount * DECIMAL(10, 2) '2.00' AS total FROM test_decimal;
DELETE FROM test_decimal WHERE amount < DECIMAL(10, 2) '100.00';
